title: TrapFix
description: Removes ugly trapdoor handles and improves texture patterns. Makes for cuter builds with continuity.
body:
![a row of minecraft trapdoors placed on a wall side by side showcasing the contrasting colors of the handles being removed and which patterns where fixed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0afd28a384451400c428b11739e59387fe61464b_0.webp)

TrapFix removes trapdoor handles and corrects some patterns for cleaner, more consistent visuals—perfect for builders who care about detail.

- Easy drop-in install – no mods needed
- Updated patterns for better symmetry and visual clarity
- Updated for Minecraft **1.21.11**
